appDetails.title: Vitu - Business Showcase
appDetails.shortDescription: Discover and connect with amazing businesses. Showcase your products and services to a wider audience.
appDetails.fullDescription:
Vitu is the ultimate business showcase platform that connects businesses with customers in a whole new way.

🚀 KEY FEATURES:

• Business Profiles: Create stunning business profiles with logos, descriptions, and contact information
• Product Showcase: Post and showcase your products or services with images and detailed descriptions
• Real-time Engagement: Connect with customers through likes, comments, and shares
• Reviews & Ratings: Build trust with authentic customer reviews and ratings
• Direct Messaging: Communicate directly with businesses and customers
• Follow System: Stay updated with your favorite businesses
• Analytics Dashboard: Track your business performance with detailed insights
• Push Notifications: Never miss an important update or message
• Admin Dashboard: Comprehensive tools for managing the platform

💼 FOR BUSINESSES:
• Easy registration and approval process
• Showcase unlimited products and services
• Build a loyal customer base
• Track engagement and performance metrics
• Manage subscriptions and billing

👥 FOR CUSTOMERS:
• Discover local and online businesses
• Browse products and services
• Read authentic reviews
• Connect directly with businesses
• Save favorites and get updates

🔒 SECURITY & PRIVACY:
• Secure user authentication
• Email verification
• Password encryption
• Privacy-focused design

📱 PWA FEATURES:
• Install as a native app
• Offline support
• Push notifications
• Fast and responsive

Vitu is perfect for:
• Retailers
• Service providers
• Restaurants and food delivery
• Motor spare parts
• Repair services
• Transport services
• And many more!

Join thousands of businesses already growing on Vitu. Download now and start showcasing your business to the world!
